message:
chore: add legacy_rio/ to .gitignore

Exclude the vendored Rio terminal source directory from version control,
matching the existing pattern for legacy_ghostty/ and legacy_zellij/
which are kept locally as reference material for design inspiration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,6 +39,9 @@ legacy_ghostty/
 # Legacy Zellij source (vendored for reference)
 legacy_zellij/
 
+# Legacy Rio source (vendored for reference)
+legacy_rio/
+
 # SQLite databases (runtime)
 *.db
 *.db-journal
